design: Hybrid minimal-formula projection: copy dimension/header from current output tab, compute revenue/ad/CAC through array formulas from source tabs.
notes: The new tab depends on the original output tab only for product roster/header/dimension fields A:G and row 5 headers.
Revenue matrix M6:AQ129 is computed from the SKU source tab using one MMULT array formula.
Ad spend I6:I129 is computed from the ad-spend source tab using one MMULT array formula.
Top summaries use BYCOL/BYROW/ARRAYFORMULA anchors rather than per-cell formulas.
